headlines.description: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane scored once in either half to guide them to a 2-1 Bundesliga victory over Eintracht Frankfurt on Saturday
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane double steers Bayern to win vs. Frankfurt

video.headline: Harry Kane's brace guides Bayern past Frankfurt

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Harry Kane’s brace guides Bayern past Frankfurt) 2024/04/27 US ONLY

headlines.description: Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen scored a late equaliser to come from two goals down and rescue a 2-2 draw against VfB Stuttgart on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen leave it late to maintain unbeaten run

video.headline: Leverkusen equalizes in final seconds to keep unbeaten Bundesliga season alive

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Leverkusen equalizes in final seconds to keep unbeaten Bundesliga season alive) 2024/04/27 ESHEET
